1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry by name

2.description: get 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality geometry

3.description: get buildings in Drammen municipality by kommunenummer

5.description: get quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from flood-intersecting buildings to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay
